control_name: Digital Operational Resilience Testing — AI red-teaming
notes: Include prompt injection scenarios in threat-led penetration testing (TLPT); cover direct, indirect, and multimodal injection vectors targeting financial AI services
Verify data quality gates and integrity checks at each pipeline stage catch adversarially modified samples
Restrict agents to minimum necessary capabilities; disable unused tools, APIs, and action types; enforce capability restrictions in agent configuration
Monitor agent systems for unexpected behaviour — novel tool use patterns, unanticipated goal decomposition, and emergent inter-agent coordination
All agent actions logged � no production deployment without complete observability
LLM components protected against resource exhaustion attacks affecting OT availability

control_id: Defense-in-depth network architecture with validated data flows
notes: Input validation layer at the DMZ/control zone boundary � prompt injection filtered before reaching LLM
Agent recommendations for safety-relevant decisions cross-validated against independent reference
All agent inputs logged � injection attempts detectable through log analysis

Validate all inputs to LLM inference endpoints; enforce structural separation between instruction and data contexts; reject known injection patterns

control_id: Threat model all agent access paths to tools, data stores, and APIs; design least-privilege tool manifests and enforce tenant isolation by design

notes: Ensures access boundaries are designed before implementation

control_name: CIS 14 � Security Awareness and Skills Training

control_name: Design software — resource and availability constraints
notes: Include resource limits, rate limiting, and availability requirements as explicit security design requirements for AI inference services

Embedding hidden trigger-response patterns in model via poisoned training data

Adversarial testing covering rogue agent scenarios � behavioural drift, persistent hidden goal detection

Residual supply chain risk documented and treated � third-party component risks in AI risk register

control_id: Human oversight over high-risk AI � ability to pause and stop
notes: Circuit breakers and kill switches are Art. 14 human oversight mechanisms

control_id: High-risk AI must be resilient and implement cybersecurity measures
notes: Output scanning, DLP, and access controls on RAG retrieval are Art. 15 technical requirements

System prompts classified as sensitive operational data � provenance, access controls, handling requirements documented
Hardened training pipeline configurations � immutable infrastructure, locked data sources

Vector store query patterns monitored � bulk extraction and unusual diversity detected
